summary: Iteration 16: Admin Upgrade Part 3 - Saques (Withdrawals) and Usuarios (Users) tabs testing completed. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified via Playwright: Saques tab shows establishments with balance, PIX key, and Aprovar Saque button. Usuarios tab shows table with Nome, E-mail, Tipo (badges), Status (Ativo/Inativo), Acao (block/unblock). Admin users show shield icon instead of block button. All 4 tabs render correctly: Geral | Financeiro | Saques | Usuarios.

issues: PIX key shows 'Nao cadastrada' for all establishments - establishments may need to register PIX keys

passed_tests: GET /api/admin/withdrawals returns list of establishments with balance > 0
POST /api/admin/withdrawals/approve deducts balance and creates records
GET /api/admin/users returns all users with required fields

verified_features.feature: All 4 admin tabs render: Geral | Financeiro | Saques | Usuarios
verified_features.verification: Screenshot shows all 4 tabs with correct labels

verified_features.feature: Saques tab shows establishments with withdrawable_balance > 0
verified_features.verification: Screenshot shows 2 establishments: Restaurante Teste Simulação (R$21.50) and OFICINA DA FOME 2 (R$27.00)

verified_features.feature: Saques tab shows establishment name, PIX key, and balance
verified_features.verification: Each card shows business_name, Chave PIX field, and R$ amount

verified_features.feature: Saques tab has Aprovar Saque button
verified_features.verification: Green 'Aprovar Saque' button visible for each establishment

verified_features.feature: Usuarios tab shows table with Nome, E-mail, Tipo, Status, Acao columns
verified_features.verification: Screenshot shows table header with all 5 columns

verified_features.feature: Usuarios tab shows role badges (Cliente, Estab., Admin)
verified_features.verification: Screenshot shows colored badges: Admin (purple), Cliente (blue), Estab. (green)
Screenshot shows green dot with 'Ativo' text for active users

verified_features.feature: Admin users show shield icon instead of block button
verified_features.verification: Screenshot shows purple shield icon for Admin and Admin iToke rows
Screenshot shows red lock icon for Cliente and Estab. users

verified_features.feature: POST /api/admin/withdrawals/approve creates withdrawal record and audit log
verified_features.verification: Backend test confirmed withdrawal_id returned and balance deducted

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/admin/withdrawals correctly filters establishments with withdrawable_balance > 0
POST /api/admin/withdrawals/approve properly validates amount <= balance before deducting
Withdrawal approval creates record in withdrawal_requests collection with status='paid'
Audit log created in financial_logs collection with type='withdrawal_approved'
GET /api/admin/users returns all users with user_id, name, email, role, blocked fields
PUT /api/admin/users/{user_id}/block correctly refuses to block admin users with 400 error
All admin endpoints properly check user.role == 'admin' and return 403 for non-admin users
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Upgrade Part 3 complete. Saques tab lists establishments with withdrawable_balance > 0 from MongoDB. Approving withdrawal deducts balance, creates withdrawal_requests record, and creates financial_logs audit entry. Usuarios tab lists all users with role badges and block/unblock functionality. Admin users cannot be blocked (shows shield icon). Two establishments currently have balance: Restaurante Teste Simulação (R$21.50) and OFICINA DA FOME 2 (R$27.00). 16 users total including 2 admins.
